channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: $120,000 a year is $10,000 a month. That is ALOT of money. — 34 replies — 136.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
$120,000 a year is $10,000 a month. That is ALOT of money.

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-02-28 17:25 UTC

OP

$120,000 a year is $10,000 a month. That is ALOT of money.

Early replies (first 3)

61910225
Let me guess, there is 4 people with this job

61910236
>>61910225
I dont get it

61910240
>>61910170
Get a clearance and work for one of the intelligence agencies NGA or NGIS and make way more.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61910252
>>61910246
Why would you deduct 401k and hsa

Its not like thats not your money

61910261
>>61910252
>Its not like thats not your money
Oh goy

61910263
>>61910252
401k you have a point but HSA is a retarded cope considering you can only spend it on qualifying medical expenses. if you don't get sick then you can't really touch it.

61910276
>>61910263
Everyone has health expenses, you can even use it on stuff like gym equipment and shoes. Besides its totally voluntary im pretty sure and most people just do it because taxes

61910294
>>61910276
>Everyone has health expenses,
i don't bother going to doctors. i go to the dentist every 6 months. i use mine for fluoride treatments ($33 a year) and the occasional filling.
>stuff like gym equipment and shoes.
it needs to be medically necessary, which means you need to pay dr. shekelberg to write a letter to substantiate the 'need.'

61910340
>>61910263
it is not difficult to use $4400 of medical expenses once a year, but youre supposed to just save up all your receipts and use it down the line once you've made a bunch of money, but $4400/mo shouldn't be making or breaking your investment strategy anyways unless you're poor.
>>61910294
oh you're one of those.

61910348
>>61910170
I remember when I really did think that was a lot of money 10+ years ago. I was almost willing to move to California or bumfuck West Texas to make it since I was only making $110k at the time in metro Atlanta. Look at me now!

61910350
>>61910340
>it is not difficult to use $4400 of medical expenses once a year
again, they have to be qualifying medical expenses.
>oh you're one of those.
one of what?

61910974
>>61910170
>50k for being from poland
Kurwa bros, did I miss something?

61910999
>>61910294
>it needs to be medically necessary,
you have never used one idiot, you don't need a note from any doctor, and you can use all that money to pay Medicare premiums once you retire. you will 100% use the money in a HSA and getting it pretaxed increases your actual disposable income

61911310
>>61910999
>you have never used one idiot, you don't need a note from any doctor,
i literally used my HSA card yesterday at a dentist appointment you dumb fucking nigger.
>you don't need a note from any doctor
https://www.healthequity.com/hsa-qme

61911598
>>61910252
Basically, after covering all the basics to live ok now and in the future you really don't have much "disposable" income.

$7k doesn't count rent, utilities, car insurance, car maintenance, gas, food

61911639
>>61910263
The point of a HSA is that you never spend it, it reduces your taxable income and after age 59 it’s basically a traditional 401(k).

>get 401(k) match
>max HSA
>max Roth
>go back and max 401(k) if you can

61911652
>>61911598
>make $80k
>max 401(k), HSA, Roth, and do another 10 percent to backdoor Roth
>$1,350 in total monthly expenses
>$600 to do whatever with each month
But also, I split the rent and my gf buys the groceries because she earns more. YMMV.

61913412
>>61910240
Do you have someone i can contact?

61913572
>>61910246
Hilarious pic, anon.

61913990
>>61913412
Move to DC

61914025
>>61910263
>if you don't get sick then you can't really touch it.
You can use that shit on anything. I'm wearing a pair of prescription glasses that cost around $5k that I paid for with my HSA, half of that being an employer match. You can use it to buy exercise equipment, red light panels, whatever. Basically if you ever buy anything tangentially related to health, you can pay for it with your HSA.

61914045
>>61910170
I make 120k a year.
Right off the bat, I take home maybe half of it.
Do I need to keep talking? This country is a scam.

61914081
>>61910170
It used to be. Not any more.

61914098
>>61914045
Yeah, for some reason this is considered rich when it is the buying power of a butcher in the 70s. And it’s taxed like it’s rich

61914137
>>61914098
Median income in the U.S. is around $80k a year.

61914164
>>61914137
Why do people use the median as some kind of argument? The median is a lesser quantity of life than your parents median and people should be more upset over it.

61914188
i.e. the median nominal wage is relative. Real wages are dogshit. It’s a good divide and conquer strategy to get folks fighting about the “outlier” that is a mere 30k more taxed at a higher bracket

61915225
>>61910170
170k/yr here, after tax it's about $120k/yr

61916482
>>61914164
I’m doing better than my parents in every capacity at $80k beyond the inability to buy a home. And even then, I really don’t give a shit about it beyond the prospect of building more wealth.

61916504
>>61910263
There's always something you can spend it on, and most of them let you invest in stocks or something in. Even better if your employer is the one contributing to it. HSA is free money for smart people.

61916518
>>61916482
Impressive level of cattle cope.

61916554
>>61915225
250k/yr here, after tax it's about $150k/yr

61916594
>>61910170
Unironically my w2 pay is $180k and my take home after taxes and everything is $10k. My 1099 income is taxed at like 40%.
Without taxes I make around $250k/yr, after taxes and insurance I make around $160k. I lose about $100k a year to the spic nig cycle

item.title: THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ IS CLOSED - REUTERS — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ IS CLOSED - REUTERS

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-02-28 17:29 UTC

OP

The strait of hormuz handles 20% of all oil exports on the planet

Early replies (first 3)

61916540
>>61916533
Nice way to piss off your Arab neighbors

61916541
>>61916533
Well if they close the straight of Hormuz, america and Israel will attack them and invade them.

61916546
>>61916540
America will bomb them if they close it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61916552
>>61916533
Closed with what, ayatollah?

61916573
Does iran even exist.

61916574
>>61916540
And the majority of the world

61916575
>>61916552
You don't need a navy or an air force to make it highly impassable

61916582
>>61916533
Uncle Jeff says now you're supposed to short shipping future.

61916587
>>61916533
more like the gay of homos

61916591
>>61916533
OPERATION EPSTEIN FURY IS UNDERWAY

61916595
>>61916575
There are drones with 10 gigapixel cameras in the air and 50 planes ready to drop bombs the second AI detects suspicious activity.

61916608
>>61916533
Nice.
Oil calls will pump now!

61916616
bullish for bitcoin

item.title: TRUMP YOU NIGGER — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
TRUMP YOU NIGGER

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-02-28 17:36 UTC

OP

WHAT HAVE YOU DONE? ARE YOU MAD?

Early replies (first 3)

61916534
>>61916524
But paxg is going up? This just further shows that bitcoin is not digital gold, it's just leveraged nasdaq.

61916543
why is one related to the other ?

61916558
>>61916534
>it's just leveraged nasdaq.
No nasdaq went up the last months while btc went down. Btc is its own class.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61916562
>>61916524

61916568
>>61916558
ackschually, highly correlated to nasdaq, with about double or tiple its volatility

61916584
>>61916568
No anymore that was before 2024. Check the charts.

61916602
>>61916524
Bullish for ADA

61916609
>>61916524
Bullish for trumps Jew and pedophile retainers

61916639
>>61916568
BTC diverged from Nasdaq just like sotware stocks

>>61916534
Gold is likely to find a top shortly after a global conflict if it turns out that the economy remains mostly unaffected by it

item.title: >At a $1.75 trillion market value, SpaceX would be bigger than all but five of the companies in the S&P 500 Index — Nvid… — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>At a $1.75 trillion market value, SpaceX would be bigger than all but five of the companies in the S&P 500 Index — Nvid…

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-02-28 17:28 UTC

OP

>At a $1.75 trillion market value, SpaceX would be bigger than all but five of the companies in the S&P 500 Index — Nvidia Corp. (NVDA), Apple Inc. (AAPL), Alphabet Inc (GOOG)., Microsoft Corp (MSFT). and Amazon.com Inc (AMZN). It would be larger by that metric than Meta Platforms Inc. (META), as well as Musk’s own Tesla Inc. (TSLA)

kek how overblown is this whole ponzi scheme stock market going to be. Why dont we just value a shell company = to the national debt and have the goyim pay up!?

Early replies (first 3)

61915412
>>61915399
Calm down! They cannot do this weekend sheningans forever, ai bs will implode on a nice sunny day, and this whole stonkniggershit will dump like a good ol solana niggercoin rug.

61915801
>>61915399
Who actually values spacex that high?

61915866
>>61915801
Everyone with a head on their shoulder. SpaceX already dominates the sky over the Earth and promises the galaxy. It unironically has greater potential than any company there is.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61916016
>>61915866
Just to be clear, prior to January they had a monopoly in retrievable rockets. The chinese have caught up. To be specific LandSpace
(Blue Arrow Space Technology Co). Now its an arms race again between America and China. Both want an IPO this year.

>LandSpace Technology, a leading Chinese private space company, has advanced toward an IPO on Shanghai's STAR Market, with its application accepted on December 31, 2025, aiming to raise about 7.5 billion yuan ($1.07 billion

item.title: ISREAL BOMBS IRAN — 76 replies — 163.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
ISREAL BOMBS IRAN

Open thread • Replies: 76 • Updated: 2026-02-28 17:08 UTC

OP

EVERYTHING DUMPING

WWIII

How fucked are we?

Early replies (first 3)

61915005
>>61914991
Nothing burger

61915010
>>61914991
i have a certified iq of 143 and i'm telling you the markets will open higher on monday

61915015
>>61914991
It will be over before monday

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61915868
>>61914991
Americans bombing sandy shitholes is actually good for the economy

61915888
>>61915634
silver will moon

61915928
>>61915010
I am schizophrenic and I do drugs.
the machine elves told me this is true

61915961
those who long

61915980
Market plummets Monday right?

61916001
>>61915022
certain stocks are OTH

61916014
>>61915858
not falling for it, rabbi. jews are as big a threat as muslims. you will both be tortured to death in this life and the next.

61916062
>>61915039
If it happens, it won't happen before market open on Monday

61916069
>>61915131
About 1/5 of the world's oil is produced in the Persian Gulf region. Iran has spent the last few hours demonstrating that they are quite capable of precise strikes on facilities along the Gulf coast. It remains to be seen whether they will decide to bomb the oil infrastructure.

61916079
>>61916014
I'm not Jewish, you retard.

61916118
>>61915858
You don't know your ragheads. The US/Israel are attacking the other type of ragheads. Iranians are the type of ragheads who know how to build a modern, well-functioning, industrialized country - and that's why their continued existence is intolerable to Israel. Iran is a country that even has its own independent space program. Also, Iran accepts the existence of other religions and muslim denominations, even making a point of having a token jew and a token zoroastrian in their parliament.

Fun fact: Iran and Iran-aligned militias were instrumental in defeating ISIS

61916145
>>61915112
>Iran is no Iraq
They're weaker, the regime literally has no support inside the country. You can't fight an enemy without an army.

61916148
>>61916079
see >>61916118 this guy's post as well, rabbi. iranians aren't 50 IQ sand niggers.

61916155
So is this time the real deal? Not like last year when it was just some tactical bombings?

61916159
Do people not realize that Iran mines a fuck ton of crypto which means they will have to start a fuck ton to fund this war?

61916176
>>61916118
You have no clue what you're talking about. The leadership is a bunch of Arabs thats killing Persians aka real Iranians.

61916178
>>61916176
>Persians
I fucking hate Iranians who still call themselves that

61916201
>>61915858
>>61916079
Lol what is this 60 year old guy typing dawg that aint it

61916203
Republicans starting wars, again

61916208
I unironically have TDS; this orange baboon drives me fucking crazy. Get me out of this timeline.

61916211
Iran is now bombing crypto influencers in Dubai lmao

61916240
>>61916211
the fuck? source or didn't happen

61916251
I will be honest, I hope a lot of burgers will die for Israel. You burgers deserve much more for subversion you suffered and did nothing about it. Now your military is completely controlled by the tribe and your carriers and planes are doing what Bibi tells them to do. Embarrassing.

61916254
>>61916240
Just look up Iran missile Dubai

61916479
Geopolitical bros, what are your thoughts about this? Do you think this will end up like what happened a year ago or this is the real deal?

I wouldn't like to see a v shape recovery.

Pls, I don't wanna have to go to /pol/ and talk to those people.

61916505
>>61916479
Unpopular opinion: Nothing ever happens.
The US does not have the industry capacity for a war with Iran.

61916522
>>61915128
He’s ending the war, not starting it, dipshit.

61916526
>>61916251
What do you think will happen, fag, when there is no one left to fight in the Middle East?

Cannibalize the master...

61916528
>>61916522
We’ve always been at war with Eurasia, etc etc.

item.title: /PMG/ Vs. Janestreet — 65 replies — 41.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
/PMG/ Vs. Janestreet

Open thread • Replies: 65 • Updated: 2026-02-28 16:01 UTC

OP

Anon pointed this out here >>61904592

How badly does this fuck silver?

Early replies (first 3)

61904680
>>61904656
Wm ethena cz trump and who knows what else.... Its a big club.

61904684
>>61904656
>How badly does this fuck silver

Jane Street Wikipedia Notable past employees:
>Sam Bankman-Fried and Caroline Ellison, founders of FTX

>Brett Harrison, current CEO of trading technology firm Architect Financial Technologies

>Zvi Mowshowitz, writer who covers topics in artificial intelligence

>Ophelia Bauckholt, quantitative trader associated with the Zizian rationalists

Man just looking at their founders notable history is nuts

>Jane Street faced scrutiny in June 2025 over its co-founder, Robert Granieri, facing allegations of funding an attempted coup against South Sudan by Ajak and Abraham Keech. The matter was resolved with no charges being brought against Granieri.

Either silver is fucked or going to be ok, all depends on if these globohomo transhumanist (((bankers))) finally lose.
So basically silver is fucked.

61904692
>>61904684
jane street is a quant trading firm, they are not investment bankers

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61907214
Jane street did nothing wrong

61907226
>>61906450
crypto retards don't understand the distinction between paper and physical

61907264
>>61907214
If I meet a Jane Street trader I slice his throat open. So help me god.

61907286
Here's how Jane Street manipulate markets https://x.com/BullTheoryio/status/2027094542563045552

61908066
>>61907286
how come nobody is shooting these demonic kikes in the streets? It's unreal the amount of evil radiating from all these jews.

61908072
>>61908066
all it takes is one schizo with a gun and the evil ends.

61908075
the vast majority of people who seethe over JS are indian btw

61908087
>LE HECKIN JANE STREET IS LE BAD
sure is reddit in here

61908094
>>61908075
all 4 founders of JS are kikes, 3 out of their 4 most prominent ex traders, are kikes and the 2 largest contributors who financed them also happens to be jews.
That's a fucking shitload of kikes, don't you think shlomo?

61908095
>>61908075
and everyone who defends them is jewish.

61908178
>>61908094
>le wall street firm is... le jewish?
yeah no shit what did you expect

61908965
>>61908094
>>61908095
>>61908178
So can i just say im a jew and get in on the free money or?

61909106
>>61908965
ask your rabbi, not random goys on 4chan

61909127
>>61908075
Everyone knows indians defend jews bud. You’re not fooling anyone

61909178
>>61906255
Cryptotards will never learn. They still think this is just another cycle, and will be proven wrong after ignoring the writing on the wall.

61909787
>>61909178
This

61910135
>>61909178
>>61909787
>Be /PMG/ loyalist
>Is a silversister
>Fuck crypto!
>Fuck all crypto holders!

>Be cryptotard
>Discovers a major shady firm manipulates PM
>"we better let /PMG/bros know, this is pretty important"
>Gets called retarded
>Silver loyalist fud crypto in response
>Confused.png
Kek a very one sided hatred

61910234
>>61909178
I remember reading this at $12k on r/buttcoin

61910251
>>61910135
You use biz for anything other than ways to milk the brownies? Lol I think that is the confusion everyone has.

61910285
>>61910234
feel free to go back any time

61910707
CMEniggers keep turning the lights off every time there is a rally

jew astrofturfing:
>>61906255
>>61910251
>>61909787
>>61909178
>>61908075

61910717
>>61904692
they're doing illegal directional market making
they're not a trading firm, it's a criminal organization

61911015
Guys, people that are into silver have known for decades that all kind of fuckery is afoot in the paper silver market. This changes nothing about the current thesis. SLV paper will be just that, worthless paper one day. Who cares if another cohort of criminals is do8ng another PnD with another fake asset.

61911189
>>61910717
>Silvaar is worth 6000 dollars an ounce in my head saars the Jane Street are sweeping up the sneedful and redeeming my bags SAAR please please don't fall for the FUD please buy my silvaaaaaar
No.

61912883
>>61904656
It seems odd that these "people" aren't found mysteriously murdered in there own driveways more often

61912973
>>61908094
>>61908095
Every fucking time

61913339
>>61909127
Indians love gold and silver. I don't think they like Jews messing with the price. They got banned in India from paper slamming. They support Israel not Tampowitz.

61913484
>>61912883
maybe less than 5% of the global population even understands whats going on and then maybe 1% of those have the capacity
yeah you could throw your life away but a better move is to use that same energy and get out

61915827
>>61904684
>transhumanist
What makes them transhumanists?

61916313
>>61911189
jews and jeets are the same thing with a massive IQ difference
but the same principles
parasites, short, weak

item.title: PYPL merger edition 1 — 73 replies — 26.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
PYPL merger edition 1

Open thread • Replies: 73 • Updated: 2026-02-28 14:50 UTC

OP

Here we go!

Early replies (first 3)

61891698
Do it Ryan.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61900235
>>61900231
why does this even matter? those are just holdings for ETFs
the losses are held by their ETF customers

61900237
>>61900212
I have to take a shit

61900244
>>61900235
OK, THEN SELL

61900286
>>61900156
They can function a couple ways... I learned in my business entities law class but all I remember is a sale of all assets. So ways require shareholder approval, others don't

61900297
cash on hands: 10B

61900941
Not selling!
70.

61901344
Looked into it and the fundamentals look bullish. Solid cash flow, alot of cash on hand. Possible buyout on the horizon and stock has taken a beating. Venmo alone is a huge asset. Just bought a bag.

61901538
>>61901344

61902103
https://x.com/ArarNecmettin/status/2026726277357695290?s=20
120-200$

61902172
I bought this shit at $52 like an idiot. I don't want a merger or a buy out. I want them to get their shit together and expand. They own venmo, the need to capitalize on that and take over the little fish with buyer protection.

61902704
>>61891943
What I am going to own Game Stop stock?!

61903001
VOLUME RECORD

61903514
>>61897932
Stop giving jews money

61904108
I bought the pico bottom but only threw in $1000

61904711
>>61904697
HOLY FUUUUCK
OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

61904727
>>61891742
>Ripple Labs will buy PayPal. Screen Cap this.
I don't think so, only because they claimed they didn't have any big acquisitions planned for the rest of the year

61908061
>>61903001
739M SHARE

61909665
no merger.
we are fucked

61909693
>>61909665
the gap will be filled

61909824
>>61904697

61910089
>>61906351
Thanks for playing, baggies.

61910124
>>61909824

61915327
Any news?

61916113
>>61915327

61914809

Insider jews fakepump all day long 10k high in the middle of the week, fooling the goyim, then attack iran on the weekend to cash out. Same old same old.

61914812
oh, israel is bombing tehran. so jews.

61914814
it's a war huh a war NIGGER ITS A WAR omg its a war

61914849

>trump tells jouranlists to prepare for a major announcement regarding iran (war, obviously)
>btc, and especially eth, continue their massive dump
anti-war, pro-crypto president, everyone

61914850
Isn'treal up to no good, imagine my shock

61914854
It was so funny seeing everyone excited about the "Jane Street" affair kek.

It trapped so many plebs. Bearbros keep winning. Just keep shorting.

61914860
>>61914800
I'm not saying it's over.

But it's probably over.

61914861
ahhh! something exploded on the other side of the planet! I need dollars, immediately! sell everything!

61914862
>>61914854
anyone telling you crypto is going anywhere but zero is either a) actively scamming you or b) legitimately mentally retarded

61914865
Thanks Israel

61914872
Israeli terrorist Attack sovereign and pacifica country

61914907
HELLO DING DING DING TIME TO SELL YOU IDIOTS WW3 HAS JUST BEGUN

61914927
>>61914849
C'est la Vie

61914944
>>61914907
this
sell your USD right away

61914970
Iran represents around 15% of global Bitcoin mining capacity, they basically redirected all of their power infrastructure into mining Bitcoin and Monero, to fund their operations and buy shit from China and Russia.

https://iranopendata.org/en/article/276-iran-crypto-mining-share-15-percent-power-surges-capital-flight/

What happens when the strikes knock out power and destroy their datacenters? Enjoy the next leg down in Bitcoin. See you at $30k. It will take at least a two weeks for the Bitcoin difficulty to adjust to the impact.

61914982
>>61914970
>i have no idea how bitcoin works nor how it is priced

61914984
STOP BUYING

61915568
>>61914849
Kek, the stonk market must be pritected at all costs! Crypto, what is that, i never heard about that before! Ok lets attack at the weekend, again....

61915571
>>61914970
Thus is bs anon, we all want to buy lower, but this is just pathetic.... At least throw in some tether or pope fud!

61915602
>>61914970
*5%
And it isnt surprising a country with a currency worth 0 has a lot of people mining, working as intended

61916181
>>61914800
I'll have to slurp like a bitch, I stg I can't even relax on a fucking Saturday, even though my npc and my stuff are still standing, any red number always manages to ruin my day

61916227
>>61914907
Why? Oil stocks climbin!

61916279
my silver doin a lil sum

Early replies (first 3)

61900759

did the March larp was true?????

61900762
This pump won't fail like all the others.

61900776
pump's already failed, stinkie

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61904468
>>61900750
payment abstraction is buying all the link tokens off the market, hurry up

61904481
bitch i got that chainlink

61904485

61904534

I'm never getting out of this shitcoin, FUCK

>>61904534

>>61904534

61904970
>>61904468

61905034

61905049

61906253
>>61905034
no this is what happened during that relentless dump in late jan, early feb
jane street was convicted of market manipulation and exited crypto entirely, they are gone now

61906492

61906504

61906562

61906587
>>61902357
>>61902426
hey stinkie look at the current chart and then say:

>>61904970

61906753

61907077
>>61906539

it was the rather giant disconnect lately that was the obvious manipulation

61909825
>>61900750

61909859
>>61904970
your persecution only makes my will to never sell even stronger. my ducks are in a row, can you say the same?

61912039

ayo stinkchinks, ww@

61912147

61912575
remember when the stinkies had hope recently :} now that hope has evaporated

61912625

61915601

61915616

orange retard should have stayed in his lane. deport illegals and get inflation under control. he is completely off track here.
history will remember this as administration as among the worst for its mercurial leader.

61915740
>>61915616

GOLD IS MOONING FOLLOWING THE ILLEGAL STRIKES ON IRAN

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-02-28 16:54 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61916452
>>61916449
No it's not

61916455
>>61916452
its at 5500 at a 5% pump. If gold pumped 5%, silver is pumping minumum 10%, maybe 15$

Silver is gonna be priced at 105-110 on open.
You missed the train when cheapies were in at 70 dollars.

61916459
Unfortunately prices will crash back down after Iran responds with a nothingburger.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61916463
Isn't the gold market closed during the weekend???????

61916471
>>61916463
This is tokenized gold, so just people trading tokenized claims on gold

61916473
>>61916463
It is, and there will be a gap when the futures open tomorrow. It just won't be the direction most of /biz/ wants it to be. In other words, Friday was an exit pump.

61916480
>>61916449
Tokenized gold has very low liquidity.
It can spike like crazy in the weekends but not during the week.
Watch what happened in April 2024

item.title: Epstein files are BTC FUD — 51 replies — 7.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Epstein files are BTC FUD

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-02-28 10:16 UTC

OP

They slap a scary headline on everything and expect people to panic sell BTC. Same playbook every time.

Early replies (first 3)

61903660
>"your fake money was created by a satanic pedo jew!"
So was all the other money, I don't care

61903677
>>61903660
If every headline is a reason BTC dies, how is it still here?

61903703
>>61903654
anyone that fell for the epstein bitcoin FUD meme has room temp IQ, brown skin and the inability to read

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61904964
>>61904276
Another shitcoin

61905665
>>61904276
just wow

61905697
>>61903654

61905775
>>61903654
'stein is Incredibly bullish for crypto. Nobody is asking "what's the usecase" when every billionaire is buying a fresh batch of babies for dinner

61907261
>>61905697
Weird poor guy

61907280
>>61904067
Whats babylon

61907412
>>61903980
>blockstream is a poison pill for btc
Yeah, this was news a decade ago. We can clearly see in hindsight all the blockstream detractors were correct. It unironically was easier to use crypto in 2014-2016 than it is today.

61907449
>>61903980
Not any worse than the whole US goverment and other governments worldwide being implicated with epstein for the last 30 years.

61907476
>>61903654
>Bitachon (btc) is trust
>Bitcoin (BTC) is trust
https://www.chabad.org/library/article_cdo/aid/1405289/jewish/Bitachon.htm

The Talmudic phrase "the Son of David [Moshiach] will not come until the pruta (smallest coin) disappears from the purse"
Psychical cash will dissapear and will make room for CBDCs and bitcoin
The model which is more reflective of Divine Sustenance to the world is
Ongoing "Subscription".
Owning nothing and depending on the Provider.

The New World of Messianic Times is moving away from the sense of ownership, for everything is really owned by G-d (G-d is not God but Satan)
>you will own nothing and be happy

Deny it all you want and call it fud but BTC is a jewish invention funded by Epstein and developed by synagogue of Satan jews like David Chaum to usher in the coming of the antichrist. I am not saying that you won't be able to make money off your bitachon coins but at least be honest and stop simping for your pedo jew coin. BTC maxis are worse than lefties, they would kill their own mother for 'wrongthink' and are not open for any other suggestions.
>it's a slipperly slope

You are a victim of PsyOps.
Just look in the mirror and tell yourself you have been tricked by jews. It's okay things can happen but instead of doubling down on your idiocracy, just accept your errors.
>lets call our group Satoshi so some dumb niggers on /biz/ will think it's some superduper inteligent Japanese guy
>Teehee, kawaii just like in the animes <(^_^)<

61907489
>>61907476
Newsflash bucko, if you're in finance you can't avoid dealing with Jews. It is what it is

61907519
>>61907476
BTC is a Japanese invention
donating 500k to a guy at MIT who then gave some of it to Blockstream 5 years after Bitcoin was invented doesn't change anything.
Blockstream != Bitcoin
500k doesn't change jack shit
Bitcoin is run by nodes
Cope and seethe, demon. We know your kind by your vile lies.

61907922
>>61907489
>>61907519
JIDF spotted. Have bitachon in bitcoin ;)

61909285
>>61907476
Stop being a nerd. It can make you poor

61909576
>>61904283
Anon, if I have to feed “the guys” my keys, it is already over. The whole point is self custody with rules enforced, not trust me bro custody.

61909578
>>61904286
racist thing

61909580
>>61904581
I'm also holding some of these anon

61909903
>>61907922
Spoonfeed me my friend

61909939
>>61907280
anon use your hands and search
>clue it’s btcfi infra for native btc staking and a vault setup for using btc as collateral without giving custody

61909952
>>61907476
Who is he? Not an important guy to know everything

61909983
>>61909939
Why would you risk staking and get low returns

61909994
>>61907412
It doesn't matter. I need x100 right now

61910598
>>61909952
DYOR lol.

61910624
>>61909983
What risk are you even talking about, custody or slashing or what?
>and yeah, some people would rather earn a bit than let btc sit doing nothing forever.

61910735
>>61909939
>btcfi
did you use it ?

61911128
>>61910735
Yep anon, native staking is live. Now we wait for their Trustless Bitcoin Vaults. Native BTC collateral, more enforceable rules. You will probably like it.

61911711
>>61907449

61912635
>>61909994

61912664
>>61903660

61914498

61915497
